scripts.db:migrate:dev: pnpm --filter @hearth/worker exec wrangler d1 migrations apply hearth --local
scripts.db:check-auth: mkdir -p .ci && pnpm dlx --package=@better-auth/cli@1.4.21 better-auth generate --config ../../scripts/check-auth.config.ts --output .ci/better-auth.expected.ts --yes && node ../../scripts/diff-auth-schema.mjs .ci/better-auth.expected.ts src/auth-tables.ts
